name: ➡️ Validate the complete End-to-End Testing from the HomeOwner flow to Tradesman flow was done successfully

steps.name: Click getByRole('button', { name: 'Find a surrey tradesman' })
1. Validate the create account page is visible
Expect "toBeVisible" getByText('Enter the verification code we send you on:')
2. Validate the creating a HomeOwner account
Scroll into view locator('//h2[normalize-space()=\'Select the job or trade you require\']')
Expect "toBeVisible" getByText('Select the job or trade you require')
5. Verify all the services are visible
6. Verify clicking on specific service and entering details
Expect "toBeVisible" getByText('Give your job a title').first()
Fill "Hiring A Plumber" getByPlaceholder('Write headline here')

Fill "Lorem Ipsum is simply dummy text of the printing and typesetting industry. Lorem Ipsum has been the industry's standard dummy text ever since the 1500s, when an unknown printer took a galley of type and scrambled it to make a type specimen book. It has survived not only five centuries, but also the leap into electronic typesetting, remaining essentially unchanged. It was popularised in the 1960s with the release of Letraset sheets containing Lorem Ipsum passages, and more recently with desktop publishing software like Aldus PageMaker including versions of Lorem Ipsum." getByPlaceholder('Minimum of 50 characters needs entering as min description to proceed')
7. Verify filling up the title and job description with valid details
Expect "toBeVisible" getByText('What timeframe do you need the job completed by?')
9. Verify inserting details into What type of work is needed field
10. Verify inserting image files into the job post
11. Verify inserting video files into the job post
12. Verify that authorized users are able to login
13. Verify dsiplaying the newly posted jobs
14. Verify dsiplaying the Details of the newly posted job
Click getByRole('button', { name: 'Join as a Tradesperson' })
15. Validate the create account page is visible
Expect "toBeVisible" getByText('Enter the verification code we send you on:')
16. Validate the creating a HomeOwner account
19. Verify Job posts are being visible and clickable

Fill "Lorem Ipsum is simply dummy text of the printing and typesetting industry. Lorem Ipsum has been the industry's standard dummy text ever since the 1500s, when an unknown printer took a galley of type and scrambled it to make a type specimen book. It has survived not only five centuries, but also the leap into electronic typesetting, remaining essentially unchanged. It was popularised in the 1960s with the release of Letraset sheets containing Lorem Ipsum passages, and more recently with desktop publishing software like Aldus PageMaker including versions of Lorem Ipsum." locator('//div[@id=\'text-editor\']')
Fill "100" getByPlaceholder('Type your years of experience')
Fill "5" getByPlaceholder('Type your per day rate')
Fill "https://www.google.com" getByPlaceholder('Type your checkatrade profile link')
Fill "https://www.google.com" getByPlaceholder('Type your trustatrader profile link')
21. Validate inserting TradeMan Profile Information Into The Form
22. Validate inserting TradeMans detailed papers Into The Form
24. Verify that Tradesman can view job details after purchasing subscription plan and registration
Click getByRole('button', { name: 'Provide your quote for the job' })
25. Verify providing a quote for the job
26. Verify dsiplaying the newly posted jobs
27. Verify dsiplaying the Details of the newly posted job
28. Verify Hiring a Tradesman for the job
Expect "toBeVisible" getByText('This job is in progress')
30. Verify Observing the details of the job

Fill "Lorem Ipsum is simply dummy text of the printing and typesetting industry. Lorem Ipsum has been the industry's standard dummy text ever since the 1500s, when an unknown printer took a galley of type and scrambled it to make a type specimen book. It has survived not only five centuries, but also the leap into electronic typesetting, remaining essentially unchanged. It was popularised in the 1960s with the release of Letraset sheets containing Lorem Ipsum passages, and more recently with desktop publishing software like Aldus PageMaker including versions of Lorem Ipsum." locator('//textarea[@placeholder=\'Enter text here\']')
Expect "toBeVisible" getByText('Mark As Done completed successfully.')
32. Verify Reviewing and Rating the Tradesman
33. Verify Tradesman Can View Completed job post
Validate Logout From the whole process
